working_on: Routine task AUDIT-HT-2 (T-PHASE-5-AUDIT) — second half of decomposed-AUDIT-HT (decomposed at S-0117 administrative close per Issue #58 because the original 96-edge + 10-node + 3-trace single-task scope hit context cap mid-authoring at S-0117). Scope: hubs 6–10 by total degree (classical_logic deg 9, meaning 9, normative_ethics 9, vienna_circle_logical_positivism 9, aristotelian_four_causes 8) under full incident-edge review (43 unique incident edges after dedup of 1 inter-hub edge) plus 5 per-node reviews on the hub nodes themselves; plus 3 diagnostic syllabus traces per master-plan §"Three diagnostic syllabus traces" (gettier_problem epistemology BFS depth 4 11 nodes, modal_realism metaphysics depth 5 8 nodes, social_contract_theory political philosophy depth 3 6 nodes — substituted for absent free_speech per S-0081 gate). Single deliverable: engine/build_readiness/phase_5_production_audit_evidence/hubs_6_10_and_traces.md per master-plan §T1-A prompt template + §"Per-node prompt template" + §"Three diagnostic syllabus traces" + §"Evidence file schema (fixed)". Routine-mode is parametric-only — empirical-fortification branch prohibited per master-plan §"Empirical-fortification branch" routine-mode prohibition (load-bearing until T1-A through T1-D close at the closeout interactive session per ADR 0053). Sequential after AUDIT-HT-1 (depends_on AUDIT-HT-1 satisfied at S-0119) so two routine fires don't race to author both halves. Closes the 12-task evidence corpus for T-PHASE-5-AUDIT.
declared_scope: Author engine/build_readiness/phase_5_production_audit_evidence/hubs_6_10_and_traces.md as candidate-findings evidence for the 43-edge full-incident-edge sample (classical_logic 9 + meaning 9 + normative_ethics 9 + vienna_circle_logical_positivism 9 + aristotelian_four_causes 8 raw, with 1 inter-hub overlap deduped) plus the 5-hub-node sample plus 3 syllabus-trace prereq trees (gettier_problem 11 nodes / modal_realism 8 nodes / social_contract_theory 6 nodes) — verdict + SEP-anchored reasoning + confidence per element per the verbatim master-plan prompt templates and evidence-file schema. No other tracked files modified beyond the operational allowlist (current.json, current_plan.md, auto_target.json status fields, register_state.json, archive/S-0120.json, ENGINE_LOG.md, STATE.md, HANDOFF.md). scope_delivery.explanation: Yes — AUDIT-HT-2 fully delivered: 43-edge + 5-node + 3-trace SEP-anchored review landed in hubs_6_10_and_traces.md (493 lines) per the master-plan prompt templates and evidence-file schema; both task criteria pass (file_exists + validate_passes); no descope, reorder, or deferral mid-session. Parametric-only review per master-plan §"Empirical-fortification branch" routine-mode prohibition; medium-confidence + mutation-implying verdicts (E-5, E-11, E-16, E-17, E-25, N-1, N-3) get fortified at the closeout. No HANDOFF entries; no Issues filed (all findings recorded as evidence per master-plan candidate-findings-only scope). Cadence trigger overdue by 4 (slots-since-last-audit 24 vs cadence 20); deferred per session scope (routine fire's scope is the AUDIT-HT-2 task, not health-check audit); next interactive session re-evaluates. T-PHASE-5-AUDIT now target-met after this session's close — all 12 tasks complete; subsequent routine fires exit at step 3 without claiming. User runs interactive /start-engine for the production-audit closeout.

outcome_summary: Routine session S-0120 against T-PHASE-5-AUDIT task AUDIT-HT-2 landed a 43-edge + 5-node + 3-trace SEP-anchored review per the master-plan prompt templates at engine/build_readiness/phase_5_production_audit.md (per S-0082 master-plan + S-0081 audit-warrant gate decision drawer; per S-0104 cross-bridge calibration; per S-0105/S-0108/S-0109/S-0110/S-0111/S-0112/S-0113/S-0114/S-0115/S-0116/S-0119 subdomain + AUDIT-HT-1 precedents; per S-0107 master-plan tightening that made the empirical-fortification branch routine-mode prohibition load-bearing; per S-0117 administrative close per Issue #58 that decomposed the original AUDIT-HT into AUDIT-HT-1 + AUDIT-HT-2 to fit context cap). Single deliverable: engine/build_readiness/phase_5_production_audit_evidence/hubs_6_10_and_traces.md (493 lines). Hub identification by parametric scan of the 15 Phase 5 seed migrations: classical_logic (logic, deg 9 — 3 out + 6 in), meaning (language, deg 9 — 7 out + 2 in), normative_ethics (ethics, deg 9 — 8 out + 1 in), vienna_circle_logical_positivism (service, deg 9 — 6 out + 3 in), aristotelian_four_causes (service, deg 8 — 7 out + 1 in). 43 unique incident edges (44 raw with 1 inter-hub overlap deduped: aristotelian_four_causes → vienna_circle_logical_positivism counted once across HUB I and HUB J, recorded under HUB I as target). Sample density: 100% on incident edges per master-plan §"Sample-size policy" hubs row. **Edge-verdict tally**: 26 sound (22 sound-high + 4 sound-medium) + 1 defensible-medium (E-5 bivalence_principle → classical_logic — system-vs-defining-principle ordering, defensibly reversed under the alternative where classical_logic is the system in which bivalence is constitutive) + 17 historical-not-pedagogical-high (E-28 through E-43 minus E-34 inter-hub dedupe, covering all 17 incident edges of the two history-terminator hubs uniformly: 6 outgoing from vienna_circle_logical_positivism, 3 incoming to vienna_circle_logical_positivism with E-34 inter-hub, 7 outgoing from aristotelian_four_causes minus the dedupe, 1 incoming to aristotelian_four_causes) + 1 weak-high (E-18 philosophy_of_language → meaning — discipline-label-as-prereq, structurally redundant; cross-references master-plan §"Audit-system-input proposals" #2 candidate). **Node-verdict tally**: 2 sound (1 sound-high meaning + 1 sound-medium classical_logic with granularity-overlap-with-constituent-prop/predicate-logic flag) + 1 granularity-mismatch-medium (N-3 normative_ethics — sub-discipline-label boundary case, 1 in-edge so doesn't strictly fire the §"Audit-system-input proposals" #2 zero-in-edges precondition but is shape-similar to philosophy_of_language) + 2 granularity-mismatch-high (N-4 vienna_circle_logical_positivism — literal master-plan §"Per-node prompt template" school-name example; N-5 aristotelian_four_causes — literal master-plan thinker-framework example). **Substantive-defect rate at edge level**: 18/43 = 41.9% — high, driven by the history-terminator hub concentration (HUB I + HUB J 17/17 = 100% defect; HUB F + HUB G + HUB H 1/27 = 3.7% defect). **Bimodal pattern at hub level**: concept-level hubs are markedly sound; history-terminator hubs are uniformly defective. Combined with S-0119's hub-centrality finding (top-5 hubs 87% sound at edge level, 100% sound at node level), the hub-centrality defense-side finding extends with a HUB-SHAPE-CONDITIONAL refinement: concept-level hubs are even MORE sound than the S-0119 top-5 (96% vs 87%); history-terminator hubs are uniformly defective. **Three pattern-aggregation surfaces strengthened for the closeout**: (1) HISTORICAL_INFLUENCE PREDICATE-ACTIVATION cumulative count further strengthened — 17 incident-edge findings from this fire alone, on top of S-0081 gate's ~19 + S-0104's 14 + S-0116's within-service findings + S-0119's E-43 + E-53 (2 cross-bridge-from-history-terminator findings); cumulative ≥48+ historical-not-pedagogical findings, comfortably exceeding the master-plan §"Structural reopen pre-flag" 10+ ADR-warranting threshold with WIDE margin; closeout's expected disposition (activate `historical_influence` predicate; retype affected edges) has decisive evidence. (2) `discipline_label_node_at_root` proposal scope question — this fire surfaces three nodes at the discipline-label boundary: philosophy_of_language (zero in-edges, fires the proposal as currently formulated — E-18); normative_ethics (1 in-edge, doesn't fire strictly but is shape-similar — N-3); ontology and metaphysics (TRACE 2 terminals at depth 4–5; not under per-node review here but flagged). The proposal's precondition (zero in-edges) may be too narrow; closeout adjudicates whether to loosen to "few-in-edges + many-out-edges-to-domain-concepts" to capture the boundary-case shape. (3) HUB-SHAPE-CONDITIONAL hub-centrality finding — concept-level hubs concentrate substantive soundness; history-terminator hubs concentrate substantive defects. The bimodal split makes the hub-centrality defense-side claim conditional on hub-shape rather than flat across all hubs. **Trace findings**: TRACE 1 gettier_problem (depth 4, 11 nodes) — mostly sound, missing fallibilism prereq (SEP "Analysis of Knowledge" treats fallibilism as load-bearing background for setting up Gettier cases; fallibilism is in the graph but not in this depth-4 chain). TRACE 2 modal_realism (depth 5, 8 nodes) — sound but with discipline-label terminals (ontology + metaphysics at depths 4–5); Lewisian + ersatz reading captured via abstract_object branch at depth 2; missing actualism/concreteness prereq for the Lewis 1986 specific-thesis reading. TRACE 3 social_contract_theory (depth 3, 6 nodes) — partially defensible with significant skipped antecedents: depth-1 expected_value too-narrow (Rawlsian-decision-theoretic-only; the broader Hobbes/Locke/Rousseau tradition does not presuppose decision-theoretic apparatus); depth-1 political_philosophy is discipline-label-as-prereq (same shape as E-18); canonical antecedents (state_of_nature, political_obligation, political_legitimacy, consent, natural_rights) absent from the depth-3 chain; CANDIDATE STRUCTURAL FINDING: social_contract_theory's prereq structure under-represents the political-theory pedagogical lineage and over-represents the decision-theory branch. Empty `evidence` field uniform null across all 43 sampled hub-incident edges (master-plan §T2-E pre-listed; thirteenth session in a row confirming graph-wide). Parametric-only review per master-plan §"Empirical-fortification branch" routine-mode prohibition (load-bearing until T1-A through T1-D close at the closeout per ADR 0053); medium-confidence + mutation-implying verdicts (E-5 bivalence ordering, E-11 meaning→proposition convention, E-16 linguistic_relativity, E-17 intentionality cross-bridge, E-25 moral_particularism meta-vs-first-order, N-1 classical_logic granularity-overlap, N-3 normative_ethics sub-discipline-label) get fortified at the closeout per master-plan §"Forward pointers to closeout" / ADR 0059. 0 HANDOFF entries; 0 Issues filed (all findings recorded as evidence per master-plan candidate-findings-only scope; disposition is interactive at closeout). Cadence trigger overdue by 4 (slots-since-last-audit 24 vs cadence 20); deferred per session scope (routine fire's scope is the AUDIT-HT-2 task); next interactive session re-evaluates and may run health_check.py against the S-0098 → S-0120 window. AUDIT-HT-2 criteria pass (file_exists + validate_passes); marked complete in close commit. **T-PHASE-5-AUDIT now target-met** — all 12 tasks complete (AUDIT-CB + 9 subdomain audits + AUDIT-HT-1 + AUDIT-HT-2). Subsequent routine fires exit at step 3 without claiming (target-met check). User runs interactive `/start-engine` for the production-audit closeout — the closeout fortifies medium-confidence + mutation-implying verdicts across the full evidence corpus per master-plan §"Forward pointers to closeout" / ADR 0059, authors the production-audit final report + audit-system-input report, files Issues per the disposition matrix, authors structural-reopen ADR memos (HISTORICAL_INFLUENCE PREDICATE-ACTIVATION; cross_domain_dependency / philosophy of religion readmission), updates README.md per Issue #26, and closes T1-A through T1-D in fetch_structural_reference_first_exercise.md per ADR 0053.
